overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character in red helmet and tactical gear standing in a desert shantytown, then the camera explores the environment past a dead body, through a pool area with cables, and approaches NPC workers maintaining electrical equipment. The setting is a sunny, dusty makeshift settlement with industrial elements and scattered debris.

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a platform where NPC workers are maintaining electrical infrastructure. One worker in a leather jacket crouches over equipment while another wearing a cap examines a tablet. The green building now forms the backdrop as the camera focuses on the detailed electrical panels and power distribution equipment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dusty desert shantytown that shifts from a static character portrait to a detailed exploration of industrial maintenance. It begins on a player character in a red helmet and black armor standing near a blue tent and coiled cables under a clear blue sky. As the camera moves forward, it passes a dead body lying in a pool of blood before gliding through the sandy settlement toward a pool structure crisscrossed by thick red and silver cables. The scene then opens up to reveal a green building with yellow trim and towering power lines, leading the camera toward a raised platform. Finally, the movement culminates in a close-up of NPC workers in leather jackets and caps as they maintain complex electrical panels and power distribution equipment.
